name: Agenda Herov4
description: With our Magic AI tool, you can turn text, images, and PDFs into calendar events and add them to Google, Microsoft, Apple, and other calendars. Lickety-split! We’re grateful to the people around the world who gave feedback and helped us make what everyone has always wanted: a simple way to get events onto your calendar. 🪄📅 Since our Launch, we’ve evolved Agenda Hero Magic, and it’s seriously awesome. In addition to converting text into a calendar event, you can: - Create multiple calendar events with a single prompt - Convert screenshots, images, phone photos, and PDFs to calendar events - Use the Chrome extension to select text or take a screenshot and create events - Take or share photos with the iOS app or Android app to create events - Add individual events to Google, Apple, Microsoft, and other calendars - Add multiple events to your Google calendars at one time - Connect multiple Google calendars and choose which calendar to send the events 🌏 Every week, people from 6 of the 7 continents, from students to professionals to retirees, use Agenda Hero Magic for their personal, school, family, and business calendars. Helpful tips: 💡 If you upload an image or PDF, give it additional context, such as, “before every event title, prefix Emma:” or “these events happen in 2025”. 💡 If we don’t have enough info to return an event, we give you a placeholder event that you can modify. If you prefer, you can always start new and try again. 💡 PDF support is currently for the first page of a PDF. 💡 Some people love the Add to Calendar button on the extension; others prefer to disable it in favor of right-click only. The choice is yours. 💡 Magic is free. We envision a free-forever plan with advanced paid features in the future. We’re on a mission to save people time (and clicks!) and are relentlessly dedicated to simple. We hope it brings you joy to spend less time working on your calendar and more time enjoying what’s in it! ✨

name: Collatev1.7
description: Collate is a free, offline PDF assistant designed for everyday learners, students, and professionals who want to take control of their PDFs. With Collate, you can: •	Summarize PDFs: Turn lengthy documents into concise insights, saving time and effort. •	Chat with Your PDFs: Ask questions, dive into specific sections, and extract information without endless scrolling. •	All Your PDFs in One Place: Keep all your important PDFs organized in one place. Revisit them anytime to ask new questions or review key insights effortlessly. •	No Sign-Ups, No Limits: Collate is completely free to use with no sign-ups or restrictions, so you can enjoy unlimited access to all its features. •	Export Summaries: Share concise summaries or save them as PDFs to streamline collaboration and review. •	Work 100% Offline: All processing happens on your device, ensuring your data stays private and secure. Whether you’re studying, researching, or learning something new, Collate is your personal knowledge assistant that simplifies the complex and keeps your workflow seamless. Designed for privacy, Collate works without the need for internet access, making it a reliable and secure tool for everyone. Streamline your learning journey today with Collate—because your time and privacy matter.

This platform enables an integrated workspace that brings together AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Grok and offers capabilities for other custom models. The goal of illumi is to streamline AI-driven workflow and minimize friction usually experienced through scattered prompts and isolated workflows. The platform serves as a unified and interactive space where team members can interact in real-time, reflecting every idea, and engaging with AI within one visual scope. This workspace allows users to not only create, but also edit and reuse prompts, notes, and outputs collectively. Users can also build and share AI workflows, prompts, and templates that fast-track the upskilling of every team member. The ability to contextualize prompts and knowledge helps drive workflow improvements, and build an accessible library of AI workflows. illumi has an inbuilt feature to capture workflows, insights, and lessons which compounds team intelligence for each project. The platform significantly reduces context-switching and ensures the team's workflow remains uninterrupted and connected. With illumi, diverse and multitudes of data can be organized into cards and synthesized into insights through various AI integrations. The tool has been recommended for organizing complex and interrelated ideas into visual graphs, facilitating intuitive brainstorm sessions, and aiding in the creation of content.

Whether you’re drafting emails, coding, taking notes, or chatting, WhisperClip lets you speak naturally and see your words appear directly in any app. Just press your custom system hotkey, speak, and let WhisperClip handle everything from transcription to intelligent formatting and auto-pasting. Local AI processing ensures that your voice data never leaves your device, making it perfect for sensitive conversations and secure environments. WhisperClip’s Smart Auto-Paste feature means no more switching windows or copying text manually. It works seamlessly with virtually all apps—email clients, browsers, document editors, messaging platforms, and more. Enjoy the added bonus of grammar correction, punctuation, and even language translation for a polished, ready-to-send result. Voice input is three times faster than typing—WhisperClip supercharges your workflow, reduces friction, and makes digital communication smoother than ever. Whether you’re a busy professional, student, or multitasker, WhisperClip brings the speed of speech and the intelligence of AI into perfect harmony. Just speak, and your ideas are ready to go.

With a database covering thousands of AI applications, TAAFT enables users to efficiently discover and compare solutions for content generation, automation, coding, business intelligence, and more. In addition to its directory, TAAFT operates the #1 AI newsletter, delivering curated insights on AI trends, tool updates, and industry developments to an audience of over 1.5 million subscribers. As the leading authority in AI tool aggregation and insights, TAAFT is the definitive destination for finding, evaluating, and staying informed about the latest AI innovations.

name: daisy | SSENSELESS
description: daisy's SSENSELESS is a parody-driven AI fashion marketplace that blends satire with high-concept digital clothing. It pushes the boundaries of what’s considered luxury by offering bizarre, conceptual items, from armored breastplates with absurd embellishments to track suits reimagined with surreal flair. The platform mimics the structure of high-end e-commerce sites, but each product description is deliberately exaggerated, poking fun at the seriousness of the fashion industry while still showcasing intricate design ideas. At its core, SSENSELESS serves both as commentary and as inspiration. By turning outlandish outfits into hyper-detailed listings, it highlights how fashion often blurs the line between art and utility. Whether it’s $24M nipple-plated armor or aluminum foil couture, users are encouraged to rethink what makes clothing valuable, and why. It’s fashion as performance, parody, and creativity all in one. By giving users the chance to “try on” outrageous pieces, share looks, and interact with AI-generated absurdities, SSENSELESS is more than just a platform. It’s a creative playground where fashion satire and digital storytelling collide, designed for anyone who wants to explore style in a playful, thought-provoking way.

Because they share Memory, they build on each other's work—creating a coherent advisory experience that learns and adapts to your unique context. **Trusted by 50,000+ users who refuse to compromise between powerful AI assistance and genuine privacy.**

name: Clever AI Humanizer
description: Clever AI Humanizer is a free online tool designed to rewrite AI-generated text to mimic genuine human writing, transforming content written by AI, like ChatGPT, into language that feels like it was authentically penned by a person. The tool is constructed to create undetectable AI text aimed at bypassing AI detectors on publishing platforms or in academia by rewriting content to avoid AI detection patterns. It works by analyzing the text for 'AI tells', adjusting tone, shuffling structure, and introducing organic transitions, providing a final product that would pass for being written by a human author. While not able to guarantee zero detection rate, the tool is reported to significantly reduce AI detection while maintaining a naturalistic and polished look of the content. By 'humanizing' the AI content, it aims to build trust with the readers by sounding authentic and relatable which fosters engagement with the text.
cons: Inactive for a day after exceeding daily limit
Requires manual tweaking for optimal results

name: AirCodum
description: AirCodum is a tool designed to offer smartphone-based remote control for Visual Studio Code (VS Code). This tool allows users to control VS Code instances running on their desktop directly from their mobile devices. It provides features like seamless transfer of code, files, and images between the user's phone and VS Code. Moreover, AirCodum provides voice commands for interaction with the VS Code environment. It introduces a VNC mode, enabling users to remotely control VS Code, which proves useful in entrusting long-running tasks or making changes to codebases during unavoidable absences. Users can monitor VS Code terminal output remotely, allowing visibility on tasks from anywhere. Another noteworthy feature of AirCodum is the capability to transform camera-captured whiteboard designs or handwritten notes into actual code with AI assistance. It also enables instant code sharing from phones to VS Code, bypassing the need for emailing or using third-party services. AirCodum comes with an extension for VS Code and a mobile app which can be easily connected with a dedicated IP address and port number to communicate and transfer files or commands. For optimal performance, it is suggested that both devices should be on the same Wi-Fi network, and for remote access, Tailscale could be utilized.
pros: No third-party services required for sharing
cons: Potential IP address and port configurations

name: BlazorData
description: Personal Data Warehouse, an AI powered application, hosted at BlazorData.com, empowers users to manage and utilize their personal data. The tool is designed to give individuals full control over their data, enhance security, and optimize usage. Personal Data Warehouse is available as a free, open-source desktop application. It helps users securely organize, manage, and analyze personal information—all in one place. Scam artists often overpromise what AI can do—like predicting the future. But what AI truly excels at is calculation. This application lets you import your data, transform it using AI to perform calculations, and then report and export the results. It’s a practical, grounded use of AI that puts your data—and its insights—fully in your hands. This application enables you to build your own Personal Data Warehouse by: Importing your data from: Excel, CSV, Parquet, SQL Server, Microsoft Fabric Warehouse Transforming data using AI-powered capabilities: Python and C# Feeding your data structure, questions, and transformations to the AI engine of your choice—either in the cloud or on your local machine. Exporting data to: Excel, CSV, Parquet, SQL Server, Microsoft Fabric Warehouse Typical data warehouses operate in the cloud, meaning you pay compute costs even when simply viewing your data. But your own computer already has a capable CPU and memory. Why not use them? This tool allows you to view, edit, and transform data locally, saving money and giving you full control. By processing your data on your own device, you avoid unnecessary cloud charges and gain speed, flexibility, and privacy. Privacy & Security – Your data stays local, protected by robust security. Powerful Search & Insights – Advanced filtering, search, analytics, and customizable reports. Flexible Organization – Customize data types and categories to match your needs. Import & Export – Migrate and share data across systems with ease. For those interested in transparency or contributing, the GitHub repository offers full access to the codebase. A community forum on GitHub provides support and collaborative troubleshooting. BlazorData is accessible through multiple sign-in options, including social logins, making it easy for anyone to get started. New users can jump in by downloading the Quick Start guide, with comprehensive documentation available to explore advanced features. Regular blog posts offer updates, tips, and insights into development and usage.

name: Next Level Labs
description: Next Level Labs is a tool designed for PC gamers to improve their gaming performance through data tracking, benchmarking, and AI-assisted insights. It allows users to monitor their in-game gameplay and system performance statistics, compare them with competitor statistics, and get personalized insights based on actual performance. Next Level Labs also provides real-time performance tracking for individual games, systems, and components which enable users to compare their current performance against their previous 90-day average and against averages of other players of the same game. Next Level Labs currently supports basic statistics for all games and advanced in-game statistics for supported game titles including Fortnite, League of Legends, CounterStrike 2, Marvel Rivals, Rocket League, Dota2, Apex Legends, Overwatch, and Valorant. Next Level Labs's AI engine curates users their analytics data to generate relevant insights that can directly improve gameplay and system performance. Gamers can also use this engine to answer questions or delve deeper into different aspects of their gameplay.

name: GenTube
description: GenTube is an AI-based tool designed for the creation of diverse and captivating visual art. It specializes in enabling users to transform their abstract ideas into visually stunning and hyper-realistic renders. The service is optimized for speed, making it an efficient choice for quick conceptualization and iteration of creative designs. It supports an unlimited number of creations, offering users the freedom to experiment and express their ideas without restriction. GenTube has a variety of themes for users to choose from, including futuristic, whimsical, and abstract aesthetics. It showcases a gallery of user-created content, demonstrating the diverse capabilities of the tool. The creations range from intricate architectural designs to immersive space-themed visuals and from retro novel covers to playful anthropomorphic characters. The versatility and rapidness of GenTube make it an accessible and effective tool for both professional designers and hobbyists seeking to explore AI-generated art. User requirements are simple - they simply need to log in to start using the service, without the need for any subscriptions.

name: WP Nowv1.1.0
description: WP Now is an AI-driven real-time source for news and globally trending events. Its primary function is to provide users with the latest world news in a concise and digestible format, reducing the need to browse through multiple sites or platforms. Utilizing advanced AI algorithms, WP Now effectively parses and curates content from diverse sources, categorizing them into specific fields such as financial markets, technology, US news, world affairs, entertainment, sports, and science. One of the unique features includes the heatmap that indicates global trends and public sentiment, offering users a quick and visual representation of hot topics at any given moment. This insights-oriented tool elevates the regular newsreading experience by adding an analysis layer, valuable for understanding broader contexts. Moreover, the platform seems to offer a subscription feature for those desiring more personalized and in-depth content. It also supports a mobile version, ensuring accessibility on various devices. Finally, the mention of contact and terms pages suggest that it encourages communication and transparency with its users. Please note, this description extrapolates the tool's capabilities based on the webpage layout and available information.

name: Alumnium
description: Alumnium is an AI-powered tool that augments test automation. It allows users to write test instructions in human-readable language which are then transformed into executable commands. This tool effectively bridges the gap between human and automated testing, increasing the speed of browser test creation without loss of precision or control. Alumnium leverages LLMs to translate natural language instructions into test code using Selenium or Playwright. Alumnium is currently compatible with any Python test framework, with JavaScript, Ruby, and others to be supported soon. This tool does not write tests for you but rather aids you in automating them, which allows you to maintain control over your test logic while handling browser interactions. To ensure your automation strategy remains agile and adaptable, Alumnium has been built to accommodate growth. This includes expanding support for more languages and mobile platforms. While primarily designed for test and software engineers, the goal of Alumnium is to make the test creation process less tedious and more efficient without sacrificing expertise or quality.

Users input their ideas, lengthy text, or even YouTube video links and the tool, utilizing AI, outputs an organized outline content. The AI is also able to generate compelling written content for the input, streamlining the process of creating engaging carousels. The tool allows for user customization of various aspects including images, text, colors, and layout to ensure the end product aligns with the brand's identity and content goals. The carousels generated can be exported in high-resolution formats ideal for various go-to social platforms such as Instagram and LinkedIn. The AI Carousel Generator is structured around providing easy-to-use, smart automation for social media carousels specifically as opposed to more traditional, complex design software. The service undergoes regular updates to stay up-to-date with design trends, social media platform changes, and user feedback. No prior design or copywriting experience is required to effectively use this tool.

name: Syft
description: Syft is an AI-driven tool designed to enable users to customize personal & specific news topics and get auto updates. Just tell Syft the specific topic you want to follow, and with curated updates on topics, Syft helps users to stay informed about the stories they care about. Users can customize channels based on their interests, such as stock picks, any celebrity news, scores & stories on sports games, not to mention industry-specific news. The tool uses artificial intelligence to sift through the vast amount of information available on the web, including blogs, forums, search engines, news websites, RSS feeds, video platforms, and social media. The focus is on delivering concise, precise, and language-specific content that users value. An important feature of Syft is its provision for continuous updates on chosen topics, facilitating a constant flow of information. Updates are sent automatically to the users Syft channel and through email. Thus, Syft allows its users to keep their finger on the pulse of any topic or event, providing them with a personalized, automated way to stay informed.

name: Meet-Ting
description: Meet-Ting operates as a free AI assistant specializing in scheduling meetings via email. Integrated smoothly into your existing email and text workflows, its fundamental purpose revolves around adapting to and simplifying messy, fluid, human-style scheduling needs that can often be prone to changes. By keeping Ting in the copy (CC) line of any email thread, the tool has the ability to read and comprehend the content of the conversation. Following this, it can consult the involved parties' calendars and suggest suitable meeting times according to their availability. If it becomes necessary to reschedule, Ting will handle this process as well, freeing users from manually syncing calendars or initiating new correspondence for change of plans. Primarily, Meet-Ting differentiates from classical scheduling tools as it eliminates the need for several steps such as clicking a link, picking a slot, filling forms and confirmation. It has been designed with a user-oriented approach, conforming to individual's specific rhythms and sometimes chaotic calendars, all while being based primarily in your email and WhatsApp. This means there are no additional applications to manage or learning curves to overcome, nor do you need to adapt to new software interfaces. Given its functionality and user-friendly design, Meet-Ting could serve as a helpful tool for individuals and teams with busy schedules and frequent meetings.

For businesses, MeeBoss leverages advanced matching technology and data insights to surface highly relevant candidates and facilitate faster, smarter hiring decisions. With its intuitive interface and conversational model, MeeBoss empowers both sides to communicate directly, leading to stronger engagement and faster outcomes. Whether you are scaling a startup or seeking your next career move, MeeBoss helps you move forward faster, smarter, and with real human connection.

name: Face Symmetry Test
description: Face Symmetry Test is a free online tool designed to analyze and score facial symmetry. By allowing users to upload a front-facing, clear photo of their face, it uses artificial intelligence to evaluate key facial features such as eyes, eyebrows, nose, mouth, cheeks, and ears. The evaluation checks for similar size, shape, placement, and orientation of these features on both left and right sides of the face. Based on these analyses, it generates symmetry scores for each facial feature and a combined score for overall facial symmetry. The tool then categorizes the overall symmetry score into five levels, delineating 'Excellent Symmetry' to 'Distinct Asymmetry', which provides users with an intuitive understanding of their score. It's important to note that this tool doesn't measure beauty or attractiveness, but rather, provides a quantified assessment of facial balance and symmetry. Moreover, the AI takes into account that perfect symmetry is rare, and certain asymmetries can add uniqueness to individual facial features. Besides the symmetry analysis, this tool also educates users about different aspects of facial symmetry and its potential impact on face balance, expressions, and various facial features.
pros: Accepted file types: PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP

Through partnerships with organizations like Planet Labs, GiveDirectly, and McGill University, Earth AI supports real-world applications including disaster relief, climate resilience, and urban planning. Its integration with Vertex AI allows users to perform advanced geospatial analytics using natural language, democratizing access to satellite insights. By merging AI with satellite imagery, real-time data, and contextual reasoning, Google Earth AI is reimagining how we interact with our planet—empowering users to build a more informed, resilient, and sustainable future.

name: Claude for Sheetsv1.1.0
description: Claude for Sheets is an Artificial Intelligence driven assistant that integrates with Google Sheets, provided by Anthropic. It leverages the capabilities of Claude, Anthropic's AI, within spreadsheets adding a new dimension of functionality. To use this tool, an Anthropic API key is required. This AI assistant can be incorporated into the spreadsheet environment by adding the Claude for Sheets extension. It introduces two specific formula functions known as =CLAUDE() and =CLAUDEFREE(). The =CLAUDE() function is generally used to converse with Claude directly within the spreadsheet. On the other hand, =CLAUDEFREE() is utilized for sending free-form prompts to Claudes API, mirroring the function of a direct API call. The tool enables the extraction of specific information from text, translation, text rewriting in various styles, content summary, data classification, etc. It also assists in removing identifiable information and can be employed to simulate real-life roles such as a career coach, among other applications. Assuring data privacy, data shared with =CLAUDE functions are exclusively shared with Anthropic as outlined in their Privacy Policy. Sharing a Claude for Sheets spreadsheet with other users within your Google Workspace organization enables the users to use the custom functions without needing to install the add-on separately.

name: MagicTrips
description: MagicTrips is a travel itinerary generation tool that allows users to create custom travel plans based on their personal preferences. Users simply enter their desired destination and set their unique trip criteria, then MagicTrips generates an itinerary tailored to these specific details. The aim of the tool is to streamline the travel planning process, moving away from manual research and itinerary planning, allowing users to spend less time planning and more time enjoying the trip. MagicTrips uses a certain level of Artificial Intelligence to generate these personalized plans through pattern recognition, data analysis, and algorithm-based recommendations, enabling accessibility to optimized travel plans worldwide. Beyond trip planning, MagicTrips provides users with trending trips for inspiration, incorporating popular travel trends into its service offering. While using the service, users can have peace of mind as MagicTrips maintains a comprehensive privacy policy and terms of service to protect user data and ensure a fair, transparent user experience. The tool has been designed with simplicity and user-friendliness at its core, making travel planning an enjoyable and hassle-free task.

name: TripOffice.comv2.0.0
description: At TripOffice.com, we leverage AI to analyze over 40 million hotel photos, focusing on identifying ergonomic chairs and desks designed for remote work. This innovative approach has enabled us to curate a database of approximately 50,000 nomad-friendly hotels, perfect for anyone seeking a comfortable and productive work environment while traveling. Beyond workation-ready accommodations, TripOffice.com provides access to over a million hotels and apartments worldwide, making it easy to find the perfect place to stay—whether you're working remotely or exploring the globe.

name: Sidejot
description: Sidejot is an AI-Powered Task Planner and Focus Assistant designed to integrate intelligent task management with a smart Pomodoro timer. As a utility developed primarily for developers and people dealing with ADHD, this tool assists users in organising and prioritizing their daily tasks, enhancing productivity and personal efficiency. Users can fill in their tasks for the day and the system intuitively assists in effectively scheduling and managing those tasks while also suggesting optimal break intervals using the Pomodoro technique. Built by illyism, this tool's source code is open and available on GitHub. As a result, developers who want to understand how it works or contribute to its development can do so freely. Sidejot's clear, user-friendly interface makes task input straightforward for individuals, aiding them in focusing on their work or studies by breaking them down into manageable tasks. It is particularly useful for those wanting to make the most of their time by managing tasks and learning something new each day.

name: Tidio Copilot
description: Tidio Copilot is a free AI assistant designed to help boost productivity in customer service teams. It does this by suggesting responses based on previously handled conversations across different platforms like Zendesk, Intercom, Gorgias, or Gmail. Copilot works by analyzing conversations across all channels, including live chat, email, and social media, to generate accurate, on-brand responses. To ensure factual responses, content from your website and FAQs can be added to Copilot's knowledge base. This tool doesn't require any platform migration as it operates as a Chrome extension that overlays suggestions on your existing helpdesk. Focused on data security, Tidio Copilot integrates Anthropic's Claude AI which is compliant with best-in-class security, encryption, GDPR, and CCPA standards. Tidio Copilot is a free tool, offering enterprise-grade AI assistance. With Copilot, customer service professionals can automate a significant portion of their workload, allowing them to work smarter. It is part of the Tidio ecosystem which is used by businesses globally to improve sales, support, and customer service automation.
pros: Encrypted data at rest and transit
Resolves 70% of inquiries without human intervention
cons: Limited to certain platforms (Zendesk, Gmail, etc.)

name: AI Image Editor
description: AI Image Editor is a free-to-use platform powered by Nano Banana, Google's advanced image generation and editing technology. Independent of Google, this tool provides unique capabilities in text-to-image generation, natural language editing, and character consistency. Users enter text prompts to effectively create vivid and realistic visuals. Built on the Gemini 2.5 Flash Image model, Nano Banana introduces an innovative approach to visual creation. The tool assures flawless character detaily across edits and seamless scene blending. The 'zero-cost creative freedom' feature offers unrestricted access to all premium capabilities without requiring registration. Users can modify images through natural dialogue, making photo manipulation as intuitive as conversing. AI Image Editor is especially proficient in preserving facial features and personal characteristic across modifications, while enabling efficient scene integration. The tool allows users to experiment with different artistic styles from hyperrealism to anime, enhancing creative freedom. Users have control over illumination, color palettes, compositional elements, and focus depth, ensuring customized creation. AI Image Editor also offers capabilities for image region replacement or extension, background manipulation, artistic styled transformation, and detail enhancement. Most images are processed within seconds, requiring no technical expertise. Nano Banana's advanced algorithms solve editing challenges in a single pass, maximizing efficiency. This tool is user-friendly, allowing users to master its features and explore their creativity by following three simple steps: expressing their creative concept, activating generation, and refining the result.
pros: Works on Gemini 2.5 Flash Image model
Solves editing challenges in single pass
Supports various artistic styles from anime to hyperrealism

name: Bizzy AI
description: Bizzy is an AI-powered business consultant that provides meaningful analytics, insights, and data-driven advice. The tool is designed to understand your business, identify obstacles, and develop a tailored roadmap to foster growth. Bizzy utilizes a business dashboard to display pertinent information such as revenue, customer list, growth chart, and ongoing activity. It utilizes AI to perform expert analysis, mimicking the knowledge, process and style of a human management consultant. Through its Market Analytics feature, Bizzy offers actionable suggestions derived directly from your own data, alleviating the need to sift through dense spreadsheets. A unique Progress Dashboard is also provided to enable business owners to maintain oversight and control over their interaction with Bizzy. This tool extracts data via a natural conversation during the onboarding process and employs proven consulting frameworks to pose the appropriate questions. This enables Bizzy to select the most effective approach to assist your business in addressing challenges and achieving growth. Overall, Bizzy aims to streamline the problem-solving process and make sense of unstructured data that small and medium-sized enterprises usually struggle with.

name: FilmmakerPRO
description: FilmmakerPRO is a free Generalized Pre-training Transformer (GPT) application designed to assist filmmakers in developing unique characters, writing compelling scripts and planning scenes with visual precision. This tool is intended to enhance the user's creativity and increase productivity. It offers several features which include providing assistance in the creation and development of film projects from fledgling ideas, lending an AI-supported hand in script troubleshooting, and offering guidance on creating impactful movies. A key feature of FilmmakerPRO is that it has been trained with a curated selection of books and articles about film making, script writing and direction. Its functionalities extend beyond merely generating randomized prompts; it operates on a logical process designed to effectively facilitate filmmaking. Nonetheless, it should be noted that its capability is an assisting hand in the process of filmmaking rather than a sole creator.
pros: Not a sole creator, but an assistant
Helps plan every scene and camera
cons: No adaptability mentioned for other types of writing

name: AI Image to Image.io
description: AI Image to Image Generator is an industry-leading tool for AI-powered image to image transformation. It offers users the ability to effect complex photo edits in seconds using simple text prompts. Not requiring any signup or credit card information, this tool drastically enhances productivity by interpreting and translating user commands into professional, high-quality visuals. It maintains exceptional consistency by using the original photo as a blueprint. Features include headshot generation, old photo restoration, and upscaling, all supported by advanced image AI. It ensures privacy and confidentiality of user data and uploads. Users can maintain facial structures, textures, and proportions with the tool's smart detail preservation system. With intuitive text control, users can easily transform their images by using plain language to instruct the AI. Furthermore, the tool can seamlessly add or erase objects or backgrounds while maintaining the photo's realism. It also supports multiple image formats including JPG, PNG, and WebP. Utilizing state-of-the-art models, this AI generator is capable of understanding context, lighting, and composition and hence, revolutionizes not just style transfer but also preserves the essence of the original image.

name: CerebrasCoder
description: CerebrasCoder is an innovative tool capable of turning conceptual ideas into fully functional applications swiftly. This tool is powered by Llama3.3-70b which operates on the high-performance wafer chips of Cerebras, ensuring efficient execution and rapid malleability of ideas into concrete applications. A key feature of CerebrasCoder lies in its functionality being entirely open-source, empowering users to adapt and expand its capability to their often unique, specialized requirements. Furthermore, its hosting on Val Town optimizes the secure and seamless sharing of code across different users and platforms. However, its most distinctive aspect is its ability to transform ideation to application in record time, thus empowering developers with rapid prototyping and streamlined development workflows. CerebrasCoder thus stands as an indispensable tool for developers seeking efficient, flexible, and rapid application development.

name: DatingKiller
description: DatingKiller is an AI-based toolbox designed to enhance your online dating experience. It offers a variety of features aimed at optimizing your dating profiles, improving your messaging and communication skills, and managing potential risk factors such as catfish. Key features include an AI Message Generator, which assists in crafting engaging conversations. The AI Description Generator helps to create an interesting and captivating profile description. The AI Dating Coach provides guidance and advice, tailored to your specific needs and situations, to improve your overall dating strategy. The Image Manipulation Detector and AI Image Detector tools are designed to identify fraudulent or doctored images, helping users to avoid misleading representations and enhancing their safety and security in the online dating environment. A Date Ideas Finder and Dating Advices features help users come up with entertaining date ideas and provide practical tips for navigating the dating scene. The array of tools provided by DatingKiller are designed to be user-friendly, requiring no subscription, registration or long surveys to access.

name: Freeway
description: Freeway is an on-device voice-to-text app designed specifically for MacOS. Once a hotkey is pressed, users can start talking and the app converts their speech into text in real-time, delivering a fast and convenient method of input that's ideal for dictation. Release of the hotkey inserts the transcribed text wherever the typing cursor is located, whether in an app or a website. This app is useful for individuals of all ages, supporting exploration of language, content creation, daily organization, and communication. Freeway is built on the premise that voice technology should be accessible to all and therefore, it is provided free of charge. It harnesses the power of NVIDIA Parakeet v3a highly advanced, multilingual automatic speech recognition model optimized for Apple Siliconto provide real-time, on-device transcription. The app is designed to respect user privacyit operates wholly on the device and does not require internet, thereby ensuring that user's voice data remains entirely private. Since the app runs locally on the device, it reduces reliance on cloud GPU clusters, thus significantly lowering energy consumption and contributing to ecologically friendly practices. It supports a range of languages from Bulgarian to Ukrainian. However, there is no requirement to sign-up and the functionality is universally accessible, positioning this tool as a versatile transcription app suitable for a wide array of use-cases.
pros: Prevents barriers between thought and text
cons: Text insertion based on cursor location

name: Hyperlink by Nexa AI
description: Hyperlink is a local-first AI agent that transforms the way you search, organize, and analyze documents. Unlike cloud copilots, all processing stays fully on your device, making it the ideal solution for professionals handling sensitive data. With sub-second search and intelligent indexing, Hyperlink can surface insights, summarize content, and provide direct citations, without compromising privacy. It supports a wide range of file types and even extracts text from images, receipts, or scanned documents. Designed for frictionless integration, Hyperlink auto-tracks file changes across folders and keeps your knowledge instantly searchable. Whether preparing for a client meeting, handling contracts, or organizing expense reports, Hyperlink acts as your AI-powered super memory, delivering instant answers while ensuring 100% data control.
pros: Fully offline AI with no cloud dependency
Citations included with every AI answer
Text search within images and scans
No internet required for local insights

Optimized for productivity with on-device speed
Accelerated by AMD Ryzen AI hardware
Ideal for sensitive workflows like legal and finance

name: MixHub AI | Image to Video
description: MixHub AI | Image to Video is an all-in-one platform that transforms static images into moving, lifelike videos using advanced AI models such as Hailuo and Kling. With just an upload and a few clicks, users can animate photos, illustrations, or graphics into professional-quality video clips that are smooth, realistic, and ready to share. The tool is built to serve a wide range of use cases, from social media content creation to business promotions and personal projects. It offers customizable settings for resolution, duration, and style, giving creators full control over the final look and feel of their animated videos. Whether you’re a marketer, designer, or casual creator, MixHub AI makes it possible to produce engaging video content without editing skills or expensive software.
pros: Free access for generating image-to-video content

name: Full Stack AI
description: Full Stack AI is an AI-powered Command Line Interface (CLI) that facilitates the swift generation of full-stack Next.js applications. This tool is designed to streamline the development process by turning user prompts into fully functional web applications. Upon providing a user prompt, the developed application comes pre-configured with sophisticated tech-stack including TypeScript, Tailwind, Prisma, Postgres, tRPC, and Stripe. Besides, it also integrates authentication and Resend functionalities out-of-the-box. The CLI handled by Full Stack AI enables developers to embark on app development projects by running a minimal set of commands. The outcome is a boilerplate code, resembling popular web applications, which developers can modify as needed. This significantly reduces the time from conception to deployment, making it a beneficial tool for rapid prototyping or getting started with Next.js. Whilst Full Stack AI takes care of the backend set-up, the utilization aspects remain in the developer's control, including determining the deployment platform. Lastly, this AI tool is open-source and developers can contribute to the project on GitHub. It does not specify any usage limitations in terms of the number of applications one can build nor does it restrict the complexities of the projects.

name: iColoring AI
description: iColoring AI is an Artificial Intelligence based application designed to convert text or images into printable coloring pages. The tool provides features such as transforming a photo into a coloring page, and generating a coloring page based on any text description. This platform also includes an AI Colorizer function, which enables users to convert their coloring page into a beautifully colored image. Another key feature is its ability to generate coloring pages with different artistic styles, thus providing a source of inspiration for designers. It supports multiple platforms, including computers and mobile devices, and synchronizes works in the cloud. Additionally, it ensures the privacy and safety of user data. The tool is suitable for different user groups including children, adults, educators, designers, creators, and even coloring book sellers. It hosts a selection of free, printable designs for colorful and creative experiences. No signup or payment is required to access the features provided by iColoring AI.
pros: Pages free to print and download

name: Free AI Detector
description: Our free AI content detector goes beyond basic detection to give you detailed insights into your text. When you paste your content into our tool, it doesn't just tell you "this is AI-written" or "this is human-written." Instead, it highlights the exact sentences and phrases that sound artificial, so you can see exactly which parts triggered our detection system. The highlighting feature uses different colors to show you problem areas at a glance, making it simple to identify sections that might need your attention. What makes our detector special is the confidence scoring system that comes with every analysis. Each highlighted section gets its own confidence percentage, showing you how certain our AI is that those words came from a machine. You might see one sentence highlighted with 85% confidence while another shows 60% confidence. This helps you understand which parts are definitely problematic and which ones might just need a second look. The whole document also gets an overall confidence score to give you the big picture. Our tool is completely free and designed to be user-friendly for everyone. Whether you're a student checking your essay, a teacher reviewing assignments, or a content creator making sure your work sounds authentic, our detector makes the process straightforward. You get instant results with clear visual feedback, so you know exactly where to focus your editing efforts. No complicated technical jargon or confusing reports – just simple, actionable information that helps you improve your content.

Unlike traditional chatbots, TalkBud creates truly interactive experiences that feel like talking to a real person. Try it now at TalkBud.com - Create your first voice AI conversation in seconds or join our waitlist for enterprise features. Used by innovative teams worldwide for customer service, education, entertainment, and productivity. Featured in leading tech publications and trusted by businesses of all sizes. name: OpenHome
description: OpenHome is a comprehensive AI Voice Control tool designed to bring conversational capabilities to a wide variety of devices and applications. Leveraging its Conversational Voice SDK, developers can integrate voice-controlled conversational capabilities seamlessly onto any platform. This enables smart devices to interact in a comprehensive, human-like conversation flow. OpenHome offers innovative and real-time AI dialogues, enabling technology to be more accessible and intuitive. The tool provides empathic responses analyzing emotional expressions, paving the way for engaging AI communication. Its open-source Voice SDK presents a vast potential for startups, developers, and enterprises intending to incorporate voice AI into their services or products. OpenHome's APIs cover the scope from speech-to-text, text-to-speech, up to language comprehension, making it suitable for a wide range of applications, including but not limited to, medical transcriptions, creating autonomous agents, managing smart home integrations, and more. To further enhance the AI experience, OpenHome offers a personality builder, in which users can customize the AI's voice, conversation style, capabilities, tone, thereby creating an AI personality that's as vibrant and interactive as a real human. The platform also includes features for instant translation, emotion detection, calendar and scheduling, music and media control, natural conversation handling, and educational modules.

name: AIVector
description: AIVector is an advanced AI-powered tool for converting images, bitmaps, and even HTML into crisp, scalable vector graphics. It transforms PNG, JPG, WEBP, and HTML files into clean SVG outputs in seconds with up to 99.9% accuracy. The platform goes beyond simple conversion by offering an AI Vector Generator that turns text prompts into stunning, design-ready graphics, logos, and icons that scale perfectly for any use. With features like unlimited free conversions, no registration, and privacy-first local processing, AIVector is designed for creators, marketers, developers, and businesses who need professional results instantly. Whether you are vectorizing a logo, creating marketing materials, or producing web-ready graphics, the AI ensures smooth curves, clean lines, and precise color reproduction every time. The platform also includes specialized tools like AI Bitmap to Vector Converter, HTML to SVG Converter, and an AI Image Editor with Prompt for editing photos directly with natural language. AIVector enables high-speed creative workflows for branding, design, digital art, web development, and print, all without software installations or technical complexity.
pros: Handles logos icons and illustrations well
Works for branding marketing and web graphics
Includes AI image editing with prompts

No built-in vector editing after export

name: Oppy
description: Oppy is an AI-enabled tool designed to facilitate job searching by increasing the visibility of job applications. Its key feature is the Patent-pending JobReady Certification, which allows users to customize their resumes in a way that ensures it gets noticed instead of being overlooked. The tool provides real-time alerts to inform users when a recruiter or employer views their application. Through an innovative Chrome extension, Oppy aids users in locating and matching with potential job opportunities swiftly and conveniently. It enables users to scan job postings from their preferred job boards in a simple and efficient manner and assess their relevance in a few moments. With Oppy, job applicants are also afforded the opportunity to apply with a Pre-certified resume, further showcasing their seriousness about the job opportunity. Furthermore, Oppy enables users to track their applications and stay informed about their status. Users receive instant notifications when employers access their profile. This tool is powered by AI-analysis and offers personalized recommendations, allowing users to tailor their resumes to perfectly align with job descriptions, thereby significantly increasing their chances of securing interviews. Incorporation of Oppy into one's job search could thus potentially enhance the efficiency of the process and increase the chances of landing dream positions.

name: Prompt Octopus
description: Prompt Octopus is an AI-based tool that facilitates side-by-side prompt engineering, allowing users to compare multiple prompt responses simultaneously. It seamlessly integrates with the OpenAI API. For privacy and security, API keys are stored locally keeping the data secure. Users also have the option to conveniently clear these keys from the cache through the settings dropdown. Furthermore, there are controls for adjusting the textbox height according to the user preference. Notably, the tool provides flexibility in model selection with options to change the current model. The history of all the prompt responses can be accessed at any time by clicking the 'View History' button. Prompt Octopus also supports the option for self-hosting on Github, giving users more control over their deployments. For ease of use, it offers several keyboard shortcuts, including commands for adding a column, adding a row, viewing history, and changing textbox height. Simply enter your desired prompts, submit and the tool generates API responses that appear directly in the interface. Refresh function is available for users to add a new key. This tool is useful for AI developers, analysts, and enthusiasts who are interested in experimenting with different prompts and AI responses.

name: Video Transcriber AI
description: Video Transcriber AI is an AI-powered online tool that converts video content into written text. This versatile tool offers the convenience of transcribing video files from various popular formats like YouTube links, Zoom recordings, and MP4 files. The process is simple, requiring the user to upload a video file which the system then processes by converting all the spoken content into accurate text. Additional features include the ability to recognize multiple speakers and support transcription in various languages. Users can also adjust the balance between transcription speed and precision according to their needs. Once the transcription process is complete, the text can be copied, downloaded, or shared with colleagues. It is ideally suited to a range of users including students, educators, professionals, content creators and journalists who need accurate text transcriptions for studies, meetings, content creation and report writing. Video Transcriber AI is free to use, offering convenience with no requirement of sign-up or special software.
pros: Works for various roles (students, professionals, content creators)
Possibility to choose balance of speed and precision
Fast and accurate press conference transcription

From elegant calligraphy to realistic handwritten fonts, professional digital signatures, trendy fancy text, and even playful Lenny Faces, Refont brings personality and creativity to your words with ease. Whether you are crafting a brand logo, designing social media posts, creating personalized stationery, or enhancing digital content, Refont offers an intuitive interface where you simply input your text, preview various styles, and instantly download high-resolution results. The platform supports both English and Chinese fonts, catering to a diverse range of aesthetic and cultural needs. With its suite of tools including AI Calligraphy Generator, AI Signature Maker, AI Handwriting Creator, Fancy Font Generator, and Lenny Face Builder, Refont is perfect for designers, marketers, content creators, and casual users alike. It requires no design experience, is free to try, and makes experimenting with different typographic styles fast, fun, and accessible.

name: Amical
description: Amical is an open-source Artificial Intelligence (AI) application designed for dictation, meetings, and note-taking. The tool allows users to dictate hands-free, transcribe meetings and capture notes without any hassle. It operates relying both on local and cloud-based AI models, providing users with choice and control over privacy. Users can also seamlessly switch between AI providers, balancing speed, accuracy, and security to meet their specific needs. Notably, Amical offers a unique custom vocabulary feature, enabling the AI to recognize user-specific terminology and jargon for personalized and industry-specific transcription results. Another highlight is the creation of personalized voice commands and shortcuts, which aims to streamline the users workflow and enhance productivity with hands-free operation. Amical also supports over 50 languages, offering native-level accuracy for multilingual and mixed-language dictation. In terms of functionality, Amical understands the context of users' applications and formats the dictation based on the application it's being used with, whether that's a professional email in Gmail or a casual post on Instagram. Importantly, the app maintains user privacy and ensures accurate transcription, catering to an assortment of applications from email to social media, all while handling industry-specific terms with precision.

name: SeekMyDomain
description: SeekMyDomain is an AI-powered tool designed to instantly find and secure optimal domain names for businesses. The user provides a brief description of their business or idea, and the tool delivers a curated list of the most fitting, available domain names. The AI's capabilities allow for quick generation of relevant domain options, considerably reducing the time spent in domain search. SeekMyDomain is compatible with various business types and sectors, from fitness tracking applications to digital art galleries, making it a versatile tool for businesses in their early stages or undergoing rebranding. In addition to domain name generation, SeekMyDomain also seems to offer promotional opportunities for businesses, thereby offering potential to increase business visibility on the web. However, contact details and promotion specifics should be sought on the referenced website. Note that the overall brand representation on the web could mainly depend on the chosen domain name, amplifying the significance of using a tool like SeekMyDomain in the branding strategy of a business.

name: EzRemove
description: The Free Image Background Remover is an AI-powered tool that is designed to remove image backgrounds swiftly and accurately. This tool employs advanced AI technology to detect and segregate the image subject, thus removing the background with precision. It caters to various users, including designers, photographers, eCommerce sellers, and social media influencers and is beneficial for anyone aiming to enhance their image's visual appeal effortlessly. The tool's features include a transparent background generation ability, which turns any image into a high-quality transparent PNG file. This is particularly beneficial for users who require high-definition images for digital projects or photographers looking to highlight their subjects by eliminating unwanted backgrounds. Another striking feature of this tool is the customizable background option. Users can not only remove backgrounds but, they can create a new background, choosing from solid color, white background, or a custom image. The tool also offers batch processing for multiple images at the same time, thus saving time for users with large image collections. Additional editing features are provided to make fine adjustments to the images. Along with background removal, the tool supports basic photo editing tasks such as cropping, rotating, and resizing. Compatible with multiple formats and devices, the tool supports JPG, PNG, and other popular image formats and is accessible on laptops, tablets, or smartphones.

Easy to use, no technical skills required

Such a capability allows it to provide accurate responses and meaningful insights, thus potentially increasing customer satisfaction and improving retention rates.In addition to its core functional features, the tool also displays an impressive ability to learn and adapt from the data it encounters. Through continuous interactions, Reggi progressively refines its understanding of user requirements and preferences, thereby aiding in the delivery of more targeted and pertinent assistance.This tool merges artificial intelligence with user interaction, serving as an innovative solution for both restaurant owners and customers. It has the potential to revolutionise customer service in the restaurant industry through its combination of technology, innovation, and customer-centric focus.

name: bestcity.io
description: Bestcity.io is an AI-driven platform designed to help users identify cities that closely align with their personal lifestyle preferences. The tool guides users through a series of questions about their personal interests, including outdoor activities, recreational facilities, and more. Users are asked to rank their preferences, with the tool leveraging these answers to recommend the ideal locations. For example, they are asked about their interest in beaches and water sports, sports facilities such as tennis or basketball courts, availability of public parks, walking paths, and green spaces, among other features. The tool is built with various tools, including Cursor and ChatGPT, to deliver insightful results in an interactive way. Additionally, the tool accommodates users who may not prioritize certain factors by incorporating a scale that allows them to indicate a lack of preference. This holistic approach ensures that the platform provides tailored recommendations that cover a wide range of lifestyle factors. It is user-friendly and can interface with users from diverse regions according to the user's input as seen from the example of a user responding from Ashburn, US.

name: ImagePromptGuru
description: Image to Prompt Generator is a versatile tool designed to convert any image or text into high-quality prompts for AI art generation. The tool has support for 18 different languages, although the generated prompts are in English, the standard for AI art. Two distinct mode options are offered suiting different needs. 'Image to Prompt' mode analyzes visual content and generates descriptive prompts, making it suitable for transforming photos or sketches. 'Text to Prompt' mode enhances the written descriptions supplied by users with AI art best practices, an ideal choice for those who have an idea and need professional phrasing. The tool is also respectful of user privacy, as uploaded images are processed in real time and immediately discarded. Furthermore, all prompts generated by the tool belong to the user, meaning they can be utilized for personal projects, client work or commercial AI art without restrictions.
